products.name: Hallway Runner Starter Crate
products.description: Precut cotton rag bundles, rug warp, shuttle stick, hem thread, and a room-length measuring card for narrow apartment halls.

products.name: Stair Tread Hooking Set
products.description: Wool foundation cloth, madder and moss wool strips, rug hook, edge tape, nonslip pad strips, and stair-nose finishing notes.

products.name: Washable Bath Mat Punch Kit
products.description: Monk’s cloth panel, cotton rug yarn, adjustable punch needle, binding needle, care card, and low-pile layout for bath doors.

products.name: Chair Pad Braiding Bench Kit
